idea-plugin.name: RestfulSearch
idea-plugin.description:
Restful Search is a lightweight plugin designed for quick navigation of RESTful web services within IntelliJ IDEA.

Core Features:

  • Search for REST endpoints by URL path or mapping patterns.
  • Navigate directly from the search popup to the corresponding controller method.
  • Support for Spring MVC, Spring Boot, and JAX-RS (Jersey, RESTEasy) annotations.
  • Fully compatible with Java, Kotlin, and the new K2 Kotlin mode.

Usage:

  • Invoke the search popup using the shortcut Ctrl + \ or Ctrl + Alt + N.
  • Search results are displayed in a unified list with HTTP method indicators (GET, POST, etc.).

Restful Search 是一款用于快速定位和跳转 REST 服务接口的轻量级插件。

核心功能：

  • 支持通过 URL 路径或 Mapping 模式搜索 REST 接口。
  • 支持从搜索弹窗直接跳转到对应的 Controller 方法定义处。
  • 支持 Spring MVC, Spring Boot 以及 JAX-RS (Jersey, RESTEasy) 注解。
  • 完美兼容 Java、Kotlin 以及最新的 K2 Kotlin 模式。

使用说明：

  • 使用快捷键 Ctrl + \ 或 Ctrl + Alt + N 呼出搜索框。
  • 搜索结果以统一列表展示，并带有 HTTP 方法标识（GET, POST 等）。

Note: This version is optimized for IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1. Compatibility for older versions is currently under evaluation.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release of Restful Search.
  • Added support for Spring Boot and JAX-RS endpoint discovery.
  • Added "Goto Service" navigation popup (Ctrl + \).
  • Optimized for IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1 and Kotlin K2 mode.

初始版本发布，支持 Spring 及 JAX-RS 框架接口搜索，针对 2026.1 版本深度优化。
